name: Gravy Indulgence Wet Cat Food Tuna
description: DINE PULLED MENU GRAVY INDULGENCE TUNA CAT FOOD 85G
long_description:
Introducing DINE GRAVY INDULGENCE PULLED MENU gourmet cat food meals, masterfully prepared with extra gravy*. Expertly crafted recipes from premium quality ingredients with pulled meaty shreds and a generous serving of mouth-watering gravy. This range provides cats a complete and balanced meal that is proudly Australian-made to offer an irresistible taste. *The GRAVY INDULGENCE range contains 15% more gravy than the DINE Classic Collection range.
  • Extra Gravy*

  • Australian Made

  • 100% Complete & Balanced

  • Premium quality ingredients
ingredients: Real Fish & Animal Ingredients (Pork &/or Chicken &/or Tuna (1.5%) &/or Beef &/or Sheep), Cereal Protein, Thickeners, Plant Fibre, Vitamins & Minerals, Flavours, Vegetable Oil, Taurine, Colour (Caramel), Beta Carotene.

Effortless, elegant and supremely confident, cats are the masters of seduction. Their abundant natural charm is never more beautifully deployed than when they want something from you. The DINE brand includes gorgeous food designed to tempt the feline senses of both you and your cat, enabling you to turn your mealtimes into a delightful game of mutual seduction.

name: Cat Litter Tray
long_description:
Coles Cat Litter Tray.


  • Suitable for cats of all sizes
  • Durable plastic
  • Easy to clean


Coles Cat Litter Tray is perfect for feline friends of all sizes. It's made from durable plastic and is easy for your pet to get in and out of while keeping the litter contained. Coles Cat Litter Tray is easy to clean and hand washable to keep it fresh. It's also suitable for all types of cat litter. When it comes to choosing the perfect cat litter for your pet, make sure it's safe first and foremost and doesn't include a lot of fragrance which can be toxic or lead to sinus or respiratory problems.


Whether your pet prefers cat litter crystals, or clumping or non-clumping varieties, Coles Cat Litter Tray is the ideal base. Place it in a convenient location where it won't get disturbed, away from food and water bowls. Fill Coles Cat Litter Tray approximately half full and maintain freshness by following the instructions on your chosen litter bag.

name: Elasticised Litter Tray Liners Large
description: RUFUS & COCO ELASTICISED LITTER TRAY LINERS LARGE 8PACK (100% PE)
long_description:
These elasticised litter tray liners are made with polyethylene which makes them extra tough and durable.

Our revolutionary litter tray liners include an elasticised edge to keep the liner in place, making clean up quick and easy - simply lift the whole liner and litter off the tray and tie the ends together!
  • Made with 8PK Polyethylene

  • - Elasticised to stay in place

  • - Large size fits trays: 56 x 42 x 13 cm

  • - 8 pack
